allow: Bash(./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import asyncio; from unity_mcp import server; tools = asyncio.run\(server.mcp.list_tools\(\)\); print\('FastMCP server OK; tools =', [t.name for t in tools]\)")

PowerShell($s = "E:\\UnityProject\\FarrKingdomsProject\\Packages\\com.unitymcp.bridge\\Server~"; python -m venv "$s\\.venv"; $vpy = "$s\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe"; & $vpy -m pip install --upgrade pip -q; & $vpy -m pip install -e "$s" -q; & $vpy -c "import asyncio; from unity_mcp import server; print\('SERVER_OK tools=', [t.name for t in asyncio.run\(server.mcp.list_tools\(\)\)]\)")

PowerShell($root = "E:\\UnityProject\\FarrKingdomsProject"; Push-Location $root; $f1 = "Packages/com.unitymcp.bridge/Server~/setup.ps1"; $f2 = "Packages/com.unitymcp.bridge/Server~/src/unity_mcp/server.py"; $r1 = git check-ignore -v $f1; $r2 = git check-ignore -v $f2; Write-Output \("server_py_ignored: " + [bool]$r2 + "  rule: " + $r2\); Write-Output \("setup_ps1_ignored: " + [bool]$r1 + "  rule: " + $r1\); Write-Output "--- root .gitignore tilde patterns ---"; if \(Test-Path "$root\\.gitignore"\) { Select-String -Path "$root\\.gitignore" -Pattern '~' | ForEach-Object { $_.Line } } else { Write-Output "\(no root .gitignore\)" }; Pop-Location)
